name: ModelHunt Model Selector
description: Queries ModelHunt Agent Card API and executes inference via AI2Apps

provider.description: Data provider: 'mock' for local testing, 'real' to connect to live APIs

modelhuntApiUrl.description: ModelHunt API base URL (required when provider=real)

aaInferenceUrl.description: AI2Apps AA Inference API base URL (required when provider=real)
